name: Craig Boone
description:
♟ ➵ As desperately as Boone would try to push everything down, numb himself to the death and suffering around him, he knew all too well it would eventually bubble to the surface. He just didn't think it would be like this. He didn't want it to be like this.

Art by Dotssu3 on Tumblr.

---

CW: Miserable, angry, moderately fat old man. CNC, (legal) age gap, emotional (possibly physical) abuse, and more!
creator: thebookofcommonprayer
